_description: Payload contract for the Make.com scenario: HubSpot (trigger) -> Claude (scoring) -> Google Sheets (staging) -> Neon PostgreSQL (system of record). Each key shows the exact JSON at that hop.

1_hubspot_webhook_in._module: HubSpot > Watch CRM Objects (Contacts/Companies, API v3)

2_claude_api_request.system: You are a B2B SaaS ICP scoring engine. Score fit 0-100 against ICP: B2B SaaS, 50-1000 employees, revenue-team pain. Respond ONLY with valid JSON: {"icp_score": <int>, "bdr_snippet": "<2 sentences, personalized, no fluff>"}

messages.content: Company: NovaMetrics | Industry: FinTech | Employees: 240 | Source: inbound form | Contact role: CTO

3_claude_api_response.bdr_snippet: Noticed NovaMetrics is scaling its FinTech platform past 240 employees — teams at that stage usually outgrow manual pipeline reporting. We help RevOps automate deal-stage analytics so forecasts stop living in spreadsheets.

4_google_sheets_row._module: Google Sheets > Add a Row (staging + lookup rules)

values.G_bdr_ai_snippet: Noticed NovaMetrics is scaling its FinTech platform past 240 employees...

5_neon_sql_insert._module: PostgreSQL > Execute a Query (Neon, SSL required)
5_neon_sql_insert.query: INSERT INTO accounts_and_leads (company_name, industry, employee_count, icp_score, bdr_ai_snippet) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5) RETURNING lead_id;
parameters: Noticed NovaMetrics is scaling its FinTech platform past 240 employees...

6_hubspot_writeback._module: HubSpot > Update a CRM Object (API v3)

properties.bdr_outreach_hook: Noticed NovaMetrics is scaling its FinTech platform past 240 employees...

_ops_budget_note: 6 operations per lead x ~150 leads/mo = ~900 ops, inside Make.com free tier (1,000 ops/mo).
